---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement
title: ""
labels: enhancement
---

### Problem / motivation
What are you trying to do, and what's missing or hard today?

### Proposed solution
What you'd like to see.

### Alternatives considered
Other approaches you thought about.

### Scope check
- [ ] This does **not** change the derivation algorithm / test vectors, **or** I've
      noted that it does (which requires a spec bump + all-platform update).
- [ ] It preserves the "clients are open and verifiable" property (no new build tooling
      that would make artifacts unverifiable).
